Here is a look at five Valentine's Day stocks.

headline: Return On Capital Employed Overview: Starbucks
summary: Looking at Q1, Starbucks (NASDAQ:SBUX) earned $830.80 million, a 86.24% increase from the preceding quarter. Starbucks also posted a total of $6.75 billion in sales, a 8.8% increase since Q4. Starbucks earned $446.10 million, and sales totaled $6.20 billion in Q4.

headline: ROCE Insights For Apple
summary: Looking at Q1, Apple (NASDAQ:AAPL) earned $33.53 billion, a 126.96% increase from the preceding quarter. Apple also posted a total of $111.44 billion in sales, a 72.24% increase since Q4. In Q4, Apple brought in $64.70 billion in sales but only earned $14.78 billion.
